title: Mr Nelson on the North Side
original_title: Mr. Nelson on the North Side
overview: Music icons including Chuck D, Orianthi, and Chaka Khan recount never-before-told stories of Prince the performer and Prince the man, and how his unique creativity, in turn, inspired them to do their best work.
